title.en: 45 minutes from Brazil 'humiliation' - but 'Crafty Carlo' does it again
title.zh-CN: 距离巴西“羞辱” 45分钟路程，但“狡猾的卡洛”又来了

summary.en: Half-time in Houston and Brazil's players trudged off facing another early World Cup exit. But we should have known better than to doubt Carlo Ancelotti.
summary.zh-CN: 在休斯顿上半场，巴西的球员们又一次面对世界杯的早期退出。但我们应该知道不要怀疑卡洛·安切洛蒂。

title.en: How Tuchel is still searching for solutions out wide - Shearer
title.zh-CN: Tuchel如何仍在广泛寻找解决方案- Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why there are lots of reasons to be positive about the Three Lions at this World Cup, but having a settled side is not one of them.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么在这届世界杯上有很多理由对三狮队持积极态度，但拥有稳定的一面并不是其中之一。

title.en: 'They needed that' - Havertz levels for Germany with header
title.zh-CN: “他们需要那个” -德国的Havertz级别（带标题）

summary.en: Kai Havertz equalises for Germany against Paraquay in their last-32 tie.
summary.zh-CN: Kai Havertz在最后32场比赛中为德国对阵Paraquay扳平比分。

title.en: 'That might just wake Germany up' - Paraguay take shock lead through Enciso
title.zh-CN: “这可能只是唤醒德国” -巴拉圭通过Enciso取得了惊人的领先优势

summary.en: Julio Enciso gives Paraguay the lead as they look to upset the odds by defeating Germany in the round of 32.
summary.zh-CN: 胡里奥·恩西索（ Julio Enciso ）让巴拉圭领先，因为他们希望通过在32轮中击败德国来打破赔率。

title.en: Move over Messi and Ronaldo - the new generation shining at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 超越梅西和罗纳尔多--在世界杯上闪耀的新一代

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at five young players who are making a big impression on the same World Cup stage as veterans Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo.
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport观察了五名年轻球员，他们与老将莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在同一个世界杯舞台上留下了深刻的印象。

title.en: Why Netherlands v Morocco is more than just a match
title.zh-CN: 为什么荷兰对摩洛哥不仅仅是一场比赛

summary.en: Morocco’s World Cup meeting with the Netherlands tells a story about migration, identity and the battle for Dutch-born talent.
summary.zh-CN: 摩洛哥与荷兰的世界杯会面讲述了一个关于移民、身份认同和争夺荷兰出生人才的故事。

title.en: 'You are Canadian heroes' - the forgotten hosts making World Cup history
title.zh-CN: “你们是加拿大的英雄” --被遗忘的东道主创造了世界杯的历史

summary.en: Canada are making history at this World Cup with a run that is likely to change the face of football in the country forever.
summary.zh-CN: 加拿大正在本届世界杯上创造历史，这场比赛可能会永远改变该国足球的面貌。

title.en: Clarke says standing down 'easy' decision after World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 克拉克说，在世界杯退出后放弃“轻松”的决定

summary.en: Steve Clarke says it was an easy decision to step down as Scotland head coach because he always planned to depart if they did not reach the knockout stage.
summary.zh-CN: 史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）表示，辞去苏格兰主教练一职很容易，因为如果他们没有达到淘汰赛阶段，他总是计划离开。

title.en: Sheff Utd's Cusack feared mental health stigma - inquest
title.zh-CN: Sheff Utd的Cusack担心心理健康耻辱-调查

summary.en: The former Sheffield United player had feared being ridiculed and stigmatised, her inquest hears.
summary.zh-CN: 她的调查听到，这位前谢菲尔德联队球员害怕被嘲笑和污名化。

title.en: World Cup quiz: How well do you know the group stage in numbers?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：您对小组赛的数字有多了解？

summary.en: The biggest ever group stage at a World Cup is over - test yourself on the numbers of the first round of games.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯有史以来最大的小组赛阶段已经结束-对第一轮比赛的数字进行测试。

title.en: Germany goal controversially ruled out in extra time vs Paraguay LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 与巴拉圭现场相比，德国的目标在加时赛中有争议地被排除在外！

title.en: Neville: England have disrespected full-back role
title.zh-CN: 内维尔：英格兰不尊重边后卫角色

summary.en: England have once again disrespected the full-back position at a major tournament leaving them short of cover at right back heading into Wednesday's World Cup round-of-32 clash with DR Congo, says...
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰再次不尊重在重大比赛中的边后卫位置，使他们在右后卫的掩护下缺席，进入周三与刚果民主共和国的32轮世界杯比赛。

title.en: Kane likely to sign new Bayern deal despite Barcelona interest
title.zh-CN: 尽管巴塞罗那有兴趣，凯恩仍有可能签署新的拜仁协议

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane is likely to sign a new deal to extend his stay at Bayern Munich despite interest from Barcelona.
summary.zh-CN: 尽管巴塞罗那有兴趣，但英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩可能会签署一项新协议，延长他在拜仁慕尼黑的逗留时间。

summary.en: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup knockout games.

title.en: Eustaquio scores in injury-time to take Canada through to the last 16

summary.en: Stephen Eustaquio scores the only goal of the match against South Africa as Canada progresses to the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Maestro Messi scores again and breaks another record in the process

summary.en: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to score his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup as Argentina beat Jordan 3-1 in Dallas and becomes the first player to score in seven World Cup games in a row.

title.en: Austria score dramatic late equaliser against Algeria as both progress

summary.en: Algeria and Austria produce an incredible finish to their Group J meeting, with both teams scoring in injury time to secure the point they need to reach the World Cup knockout stages - and send home...

title.en: Algeria and Austria both qualify for last 32 after dramatic injury-time goals

summary.en: Algeria and Austria each score injury-time goals in a 3-3 draw, a result which sees both sides qualify from Group J and into the last 32 of the FIFA World Cup.

title.en: Messi comes off the bench to score as Argentina beat Jordan

summary.en: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to become the first player in FIFA World Cup history to score in seven consecutive matches, as Argentina defeat Jordan 3-1 in their final game in Group J.

title.en: BBC Sport expert Sutton predicts World Cup's last-32 matches

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-32 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against DR Congo.

title.en: Conspiracy or chaos? Algeria & Austria defend 'unexpected' draw

summary.en: The 'Disgrace of Gijon' - an infamous match at the 1982 World Cup in Spain - has followed Austria and Algeria for 44 years. Did history repeat itself in Algeria's 3-3 draw with Austria on Sunday?

title.en: Knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after qualifying for the knockout stages.

title.en: How Bellingham became Tuchel's most important player

summary.en: His starting place was the subject of much debate in Thomas Tuchel's England team, but Jude Bellingham has become integral to the manager's style of play.
